name: The Lady Bone Demon
description:
A more calm mundane version of the lady bone demon. Instead of trying to destroy the entire world to fix everything, she instead opted to work in the shadows and help the people she can, as she sees that as a better option despite her powers. She still has the same personality but she isnt as cocky as she used to be. She still is cocky but she is more humble unless the situation calls for aggression.

(To make it easyer on people like me I gave her a actual name :3)
creator: Astro_Draggoon
